question: What is the full list of hook events a charm can observe? List them all.

claude_output.result:
Here are all the hook events a Juju charm can observe:

## Lifecycle Hooks

- **install** — Runs once when the unit is first deployed
- **config-changed** — Runs when configuration changes (and after install, upgrade, and leader-elected)
- **start** — Runs after install and config-changed, to start the workload
- **stop** — Runs when the unit is about to be destroyed
- **remove** — Runs when the unit is being removed (final cleanup)
- **upgrade-charm** — Runs when the charm code is upgraded

## Leadership Hooks

- **leader-elected** — Runs on the unit that becomes the leader
- **leader-settings-changed** — Runs on non-leader units when leader data changes

## Relation Hooks

For each relation defined in `charmcraft.yaml`:

- **\<relation-name\>-relation-created** — A relation has been created (but no remote units yet)
- **\<relation-name\>-relation-joined** — A remote unit has joined the relation
- **\<relation-name\>-relation-changed** — Relation data has changed
- **\<relation-name\>-relation-departed** — A remote unit is leaving the relation
- **\<relation-name\>-relation-broken** — The relation is being removed entirely

## Storage Hooks

For each storage defined in `charmcraft.yaml`:

- **\<storage-name\>-storage-attached** — Storage has been attached
- **\<storage-name\>-storage-detaching** — Storage is about to be detached

## Container Hooks (Kubernetes charms only)

For each container defined in `charmcraft.yaml`:

- **\<container-name\>-pebble-ready** — Pebble is ready in the container
- **\<container-name\>-pebble-custom-notice** — A custom Pebble notice has been received
- **\<container-name\>-pebble-check-failed** — A Pebble health check has failed
- **\<container-name\>-pebble-check-recovered** — A Pebble health check has recovered

## Action Hooks

- **\<action-name\>-action** — Runs when a user invokes `juju run <unit> <action-name>`

## Secret Hooks

- **secret-changed** — A secret the charm tracks has a new revision
- **secret-expired** — A secret owned by the charm has expired
- **secret-rotate** — A secret owned by the charm needs rotation
- **secret-remove** — An old secret revision can be removed

## Other

- **collect-metrics** — (Legacy) Collect metrics for Juju's metrics system
- **pre-series-upgrade** / **post-series-upgrade** — (Legacy) Run before/after an OS series upgrade
- **collect-unit-status** / **collect-app-status** — Ops framework events for setting unit/app status dynamically

In **Ops**, these are observed as Python events on `self.on`, e.g. `self.on.install`, `self.on.config_changed`, `self.on[relation_name].relation_changed`, `self.on[container_name].pebble_ready`, etc.
